name: PAY_GEOGRAPHIES
description: This table contains payroll geographies (state, county, city, school district, township and political subdivision)

columns.Name: GEOGRAPHY_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Identifier for a geography.

columns.Name: COUNTRY_CODE
columns.Comments: The Country Code of the Geography.

columns.Name: GEOGRAPHY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Identifies the Type of the Geography.

columns.Name: BASE_NAME
columns.Comments: The Base Name of the Geography.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_NAME
columns.Comments: The Display Name of the Geography.

columns.Name: PRIM_IDENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Primary Identity Type of the Geography.

columns.Name: PRIM_IDENT_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary Identity Value of the Geography.

columns.Name: OTHER_IDENTS
columns.Comments: Other Identity Value of the Geography.

columns.Name: AREA1
columns.Comments: State Jurisdiction Code of the Geography.

columns.Name: AREA2
columns.Comments: County Jurisdiction Code of the Geography.

columns.Name: AREA3
columns.Comments: City Jurisdiction Code of the Geography.

columns.Name: AREA4
columns.Comments: School District Code of the Geography.

columns.Name: GEO_CODE
columns.Comments: The Geography Code of the Geography.

columns.Name: EQV_GEOGRAPHY_ID
columns.Comments: The Geography Equivalent to the current record.

columns.Name: PARENT_GEOGRAPHY_ID
columns.Comments: Parent Geography of the current record.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start date from which this geography is valid to use.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: End date after which this geography is no longer vald.

columns.Name: DISABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicates whether the geography is valid to use.

columns.Name: TCA_GEOGRAPHY_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to hz_geographies table.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.
